checks.name: 2.9 Sanity: +14% PnL / -54% MaxDD combo
checks.detail: Plausible because V13 specifically targets LOSS clusters. Removing 106 pts of losses while keeping most wins → PF can jump significantly. Not a 'too good' red flag because losers have fixed SL (~-14) while winners vary.
